allow: PowerShell($pids = \(netstat -ano | Select-String ":8000" | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '\\s+'\)[-1] } | Sort-Object -Unique\); foreach \($p in $pids\) { if \($p -match '^\\d+$' -and $p -ne '0'\) { taskkill /PID $p /F 2>$null } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; netstat -ano | findstr ":8000")

PowerShell($pids = \(netstat -ano | Select-String ":8000" | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '\\s+'\)[-1] } | Where-Object { $_ -match '^\\d+$' -and $_ -ne '0' } | Sort-Object -Unique\); foreach \($p in $pids\) { taskkill /PID $p /F 2>$null }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; cd "c:\\Users\\Donga\\Desktop\\EOCHAEEUN\\0.0\\backend"; Start-Process python -ArgumentList "-m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; netstat -ano | findstr ":8000")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/docs" -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "백엔드 정상 응답: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "아직 기동 중..." })
